news.t: YieldMax® ETFs Announces Weekly Distributions for Group 1 ETFs
UPDATE - YieldMax® ETFs Announces Weekly Distributions for Group 1 ETFs
YieldMax® ETFs Announces Transition to Weekly Distributions Across Product Suite
YieldMax™ Launches AI & Tech Portfolio Option Income ETF (GPTY)

holdings.infoBox: GPTY is an equity ETF with a total of 76 individual holdings. The top holdings are Marvell Technology stock at 8.91%, Advanced Micro Devices at 6.62%, NVIDIA at 6.10%, Alphabet at 5.56%, and Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 5.24%.

overview.description: The YieldMax AI & Tech Portfolio Option Income ETF (GPTY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of 15 to 30 US-listed companies deriving significant revenue from AI and technology, complemented by various complex options strategies. The fund seeks to provide current income and, secondarily, capital appreciation. GPTY was launched on Jan 22, 2025 and is issued by YieldMax.

data.text: CHICAGO and MILWAUKEE and NEW YORK, June 16, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- YieldMax® ETFs announced distributions for the YieldMax® Group 1 weekly pay ETFs.
